name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Endorsements . . . Endorsements . . . Endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| |
#
# Endorsements, Endorsements . . .
# And More Endorsements
With just over five weeks to go until the June 2nd Primary, Dr. Nina Ahmad is proud to announce endorsements and support from a broad coalition of Progressive groups, labor unions, elected officials and others representing Pennsylvanians from every walk of life. "I am proud and humbled by the overwhelming support our campaign has received from every corner of the Commonwealth. I am running for Auditor General to fight for every Pennsylvania resident, and these supporters and endorsers reflect that commitment." \- Nina Ahmad More than the organizations themselves, Dr. Nina is proud to have the support of the people these organizations and individuals represents - working families, Progressives, Progressive woman, immigrants, communities of color and other everyday Pennsylvanians like you, your family, friends and neighbors. We need strong Progressive leaders like Dr. Nina Ahmad representing us on the ballot this Fall, but that won't happen without your help. **You can join our growing movement and ensure that Dr. Nina wins this Primary by making a contribution to our campaign today! ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/l6R0W9ZTW_oQTs4UZg1fhCnKxKsHUeAbcnU88UYJQmY=/8_kuuoqgyaNIu0hEZXIpvkSXOKFGnfvr_GHHpW1ZnLk=) **LABOR UNIONS:** *PHL AFL-CIO Recommended **ORGANIZATIONS:** **ELECTED OFFICIALS** Congressmember Brendan Boyle State Senator Katie Muth State Senator Art Haywood State Senator Anthony Williams State Representative Joanna McClinton State Representative Jordan Harris State Representative Steve Kinsey State Representative Jared Solomon City Councilmember Cindy Bass City Councilmember Kenyatta Johnson Philadelphia Sheriff Rochelle Bilal Montgomery County Treasurer Jason Salus Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/l6R0W9ZTW_oQTs4UZg1fhCnKxKsHUeAbcnU88UYJQmY=/gbjVfyGIhfUgeaATzwDv3SsDpxjnyeoMkRgTuv8P99c=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/l6R0W9ZTW_oQTs4UZg1fhCnKxKsHUeAbcnU88UYJQmY=/8_kuuoqgyaNIu0hEZXIpvkSXOKFGnfvr_GHHpW1ZnLk=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/l6R0W9ZTW_oQTs4UZg1fhCnKxKsHUeAbcnU88UYJQmY=/8NwcjAIKB0HIC_bjhSPPuaAYkQ9kVLOPrujkl5AvsXA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/l6R0W9ZTW_oQTs4UZg1fhCnKxKsHUeAbcnU88UYJQmY=/_YtOHIb86r64fKzF6EDX8xwlwDBi2EhUXHsljN5NxlY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/l6R0W9ZTW_oQTs4UZg1fhCnKxKsHUeAbcnU88UYJQmY=/SLTTI-OMK0wyl4S6svna66mgiPOaNCyKPD8xuNSMvm4=?hl=en)

I’m sending her the card in 1 hour, so make sure you add your name NOW if you want her to see it.

The COVID-19 pandemic is a generation-defining event. Our patchwork and ineffective response to it has demonstrated how important it is to elect the __right__ people at __all__ levels of government.
Our opponents think that endless repetition of ideological tropes and party talking points is their route to Congress. Rick knows better. He is the only candidate in the race with policy proposals targeted at improving the day-to-day lives of Central Texans.
The social and economic after-effects of this pandemic are going to last for years, if not decades. Rick believes that now, more than ever, we need practical problems solvers in Congress who will put country and constituents ahead of destructive party politics.
[**Can you chip in any amount today and help us hit our end-of-month goal so we can send Rick to be our voice in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17268526/188724847/-704092404?refcode=RKC_20191227_em_fr_all_eoy1_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2M5NjljOC1jMTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LcMY7W2i1_tTJQO_W6KB6-kRRYlHr5uvXnAwNyEWVm0=)

Rick believes that now, more than ever, we need practical problems solvers in Congress who will put country and constituents ahead of destructive party politics. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Team Kennedy | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17269476/188751973/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQyOTNhMi1jZTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vx_n4K536zKwtgUGrxoMM_KGxVouyeneNQNnkVIQsg=&emci=e4b28a2a-c387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aed293a2-ce87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi everyone, I wanted to make sure you saw this email from the other day because I’m not sure we celebrated as much as we should have. **I’m so genuinely touched and overwhelmed by all the support you’ve shown my campaign and me.** Just looking at the stack of signatures from all our neighbors and community members and at the photos of all of us canvassing, back when we could, reminds me why we embarked on this campaign: for ALL OF US. We have the opportunity to create the change we deserve and I’m so grateful you are a part of it. Thank you again for your support and hard work!! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17269478/188751975/-756790116?refcode=E2448-20200426-EoM1-graphic&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQyOTNhMi1jZTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vx_n4K536zKwtgUGrxoMM_KGxVouyeneNQNnkVIQsg=) You’ve all supported this campaign so much over the last few months and I’m so thankful, but we still have a lot of work to do—so I’m going to ask you to help keep up the momentum and help again. Our April Fundraising deadline is coming up in a few days, and we’re $10,000 short of where we need to be. [**Could you help us keep up our incredible momentum by contributing right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17269480/188751977/-756790116?refcode=E2448-20200426-EoM1-SL&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQyOTNhMi1jZTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vx_n4K536zKwtgUGrxoMM_KGxVouyeneNQNnkVIQsg=) Thanks so much,
Margaret

All your hard work and pounding the pavement really paid off. **We’re so proud to announce that Margaret is officially on the ballot!** [**Will you continue to help Margaret get elected to Congress? > * Created a COVID-19 information page on our website to provide a consolidated source for news updates and resources to help keep our community safe. [**Click here to check it out → **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17269483/188751981/-241073385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQyOTNhMi1jZTg3LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vx_n4K536zKwtgUGrxoMM_KGxVouyeneNQNnkVIQsg=&emci=e4b28a2a-c387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aed293a2-ce87-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)

name: Team Gianforte
subject: Can Greg count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG FOR MONTANA, REPUBLICAN
body:
Greg knows how dedicated and supportive you have been in the fight to protect Montana, which is why he told us that he is confident that with your support today, we can bounce back and be on track to reaching our goal by Thursday, April 30th.
Friend,
We are quickly approaching our most important fundraising deadline yet, and **we are at a serious risk of falling short!**
As a result of the changes we've had to make to keep Montanans safe, our campaign has been fully online for the entire month of April.
Because of this, our campaign has taken a hit in it's overall fundraising numbers and is now at major risk of falling short of our April goal.
Greg knows how dedicated and supportive you have been in the fight to protect Montana, which is why he told us that he is confident that with your support today, we can bounce back and be on track to reaching our goal by **Thursday, April 30th**.
We can't let Greg down, Friend! And now, here we are, facing another End of Month deadline square in the face.
Now is the PERFECT opportunity to give him an update on just how motivated Texans are to defend our conservative values, I want to share our numbers this month with him.
...But I want to make sure he's REALLY impressed.
**[That's why I've asked a generous group of donors to step forward to sweeten the pot. Now, this End of Month Fund will include a QUADRUPLE MATCH.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qttYZZbWhjylPG88cmfhrP_qdDK1I9B2kX8nieHzc1qVaajmhG9ORlpVPvDvt6hUXoqoTHAhDtNWMXZo_nxfwWQgB_hWp4rU3kSFdBIW4T6II-ysJojbYnvW9Xb032qvoWzm1dWsMSDMpwfk2m2Uz5wbmmjgOsL6dEGKT5pVprmPuW18k418ltNLPm9BAqYoQ-m4c0ob-sinwAISFyVLvPd3NwY1GXImt36hWPDUanbVHpnLD7fGPE68JmhUA50ONJR2Z_zAMJKd-BEeexD41fhX3oOryOFGe0QmtG7bkEy0Gi9p6-qIjkfXAV9fX6u_NU7M5DqQdB3u7guhINXtmEsXClxnJ5L4&c=Txb3XJqgiAX2ajsTnR0awaMK9LSVhbrOHj5Q11krpaHZlB3jO5Ih6Q==&ch=NnxSkY54CmMZYPqRtgncKJMzn_bzrWYIW6lpIsWdurkPoqBVhyjW5g==)**

I can tell him we have his back all day long, but when I show him numbers to prove it, well, that will get his attention.
**[I want to reassure President Trump that he can truly trust Texas.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qttYZZbWhjylPG88cmfhrP_qdDK1I9B2kX8nieHzc1qVaajmhG9ORlpVPvDvt6hUXoqoTHAhDtNWMXZo_nxfwWQgB_hWp4rU3kSFdBIW4T6II-ysJojbYnvW9Xb032qvoWzm1dWsMSDMpwfk2m2Uz5wbmmjgOsL6dEGKT5pVprmPuW18k418ltNLPm9BAqYoQ-m4c0ob-sinwAISFyVLvPd3NwY1GXImt36hWPDUanbVHpnLD7fGPE68JmhUA50ONJR2Z_zAMJKd-BEeexD41fhX3oOryOFGe0QmtG7bkEy0Gi9p6-qIjkfXAV9fX6u_NU7M5DqQdB3u7guhINXtmJlvpb51fVNT&c=Txb3XJqgiAX2ajsTnR0awaMK9LSVhbrOHj5Q11krpaHZlB3jO5Ih6Q==&ch=NnxSkY54CmMZYPqRtgncKJMzn_bzrWYIW6lpIsWdurkPoqBVhyjW5g==) **

There's no better way to show it than a long list of donations tagged with the message I SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP.
**[Will you chip in immediately to help me CRUSH my End of Month goal with a 4X MATCHED donation and impress our president?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qttYZZbWhjylPG88cmfhrP_qdDK1I9B2kX8nieHzc1qVaajmhG9ORlpVPvDvt6hUXoqoTHAhDtNWMXZo_nxfwWQgB_hWp4rU3kSFdBIW4T6II-ysJojbYnvW9Xb032qvoWzm1dWsMSDMpwfk2m2Uz5wbmmjgOsL6dEGKT5pVprmPuW18k418ltNLPm9BAqYoQ-m4c0ob-sinwAISFyVLvPd3NwY1GXImt36hWPDUanbVHpnLD7fGPE68JmhUA50ONJR2Z_zAMJKd-BEeexD41fhX3oOryOFGe0QmtG7bkEy0Gi9p6-qIjkfXAV9fX6u_NU7M5DqQdB3u7guhINXtmBSTi09q4szF&c=Txb3XJqgiAX2ajsTnR0awaMK9LSVhbrOHj5Q11krpaHZlB3jO5Ih6Q==&ch=NnxSkY54CmMZYPqRtgncKJMzn_bzrWYIW6lpIsWdurkPoqBVhyjW5g==)**

My far left opponent has amassed a fortune to use against us - **$11 MILLION** in the first 3 months of 2020, to be exact. **That 's an average of about $120,000 per DAY.** And now, Chuck Schumer's Super PAC is throwing millions more into flipping Arizona's seat and the whole Senate blue.

[**Chip in $48 immediately so we can win in November and get back to defending President Trump 's Agenda!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVp34aTnKTXADClOpDj-LKS26Ghkdh5LNGDeJ_AzR0gQq3xep0n6NTuy0AcfUmCt2wQ3VyuAUfxTJVVAjCdXuAk_Ptgdb7xU4Z4NBx-TdvujO045p3CmG5DZNzs-c2KrrS59QYxqZEEOk4scSnnaLZxzfsEYK3LrUnXcapi51Wt-z-0WWW7-BmHnZXoT4_LsrqGJKvVFmacHTKW3kSOE5Tso35fxYcZAvHg1OpQc0Mhxpd_0mm1ltqXdigmNKvlVrdgjcywFsc4aHh-hP3bqrDRSpOHsT3Ws6vPJs8y8xSzZJo_cie7Cwi3W5DBjm0RuRTZVi9Fee6gUQJ3pNxMaOX2FXAzg5JtpYqn7sm9BCqGwq1Qmub_gWwZidEyZsLTgirhVHOl5fwrA95FjfC4pvCiqzKftQytH4rw-s6tfojCiEv0Z0Lh1Ug==&c=7Vwth06ikkMpMhihqIXiJ6U0qSWdd-UjiVkLUgepcccls-XD29vmtw==&ch=vZ-aidpFHi75zkydG-HkU6cKLngp8H815R9sMQvCTQI_xrqrUYJI4A==)

We are dangerously close to losing the Senate. Pelosi, Schumer and the whole Liberal Establishment think their path to the Senate runs through Arizona. **They only need to flip 4 seats, to take total control.**

[**So, that 's why I am asking you to chip in $48 and help us keep Arizona and the Senate red.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVp34aTnKTXADClOpDj-LKS26Ghkdh5LNGDeJ_AzR0gQq3xep0n6NTuy0AcfUmCtahhALRHTwzrWsligsAFpoF8x0irib2-HIM4R7grQtNEd7s13WLHB0r_8v5RBmVVGb8Tb-a8_gI_kzq-ITPBnahmLJfgeudEja6rlSZgiQz1WtrKOvYpHP72QNalAV3K0fruhEB_fSS77HMQWwcpwNJ1g_CYpCpj_eMW9w9clPuCNveo-MELyDDP4mB5SceWidpCGoI3SD7n2GO7vz1kMibXSNclzZvEpWaf7cCErDOEaMbIvPFuOmKLFHe7fTMw_vQmAwbtTq3LT7lgv95NhCt1b-4wJw2TJuSRiGTrfj4piQxGUTRSbGKUfKHTffjaT8qVeBD53D15QdLdTKdWidsNq_zVX9FYtdgLCmu5f6Q4=&c=7Vwth06ikkMpMhihqIXiJ6U0qSWdd-UjiVkLUgepcccls-XD29vmtw==&ch=vZ-aidpFHi75zkydG-HkU6cKLngp8H815R9sMQvCTQI_xrqrUYJI4A==) We only have **4 days left** to catch up before the next fundraising deadline.

body:
We must rely on strong leaders, like Senator Cory Gardner (R-CO), who has been an outspoken advocate for holding the Chinese government accountable. Cory has called on both the WHO and the National Security Council to take swift action against the Chinese Communist Party's use of this crisis to advance their interests.
Friend,

Our news feeds are overwhelmed with headlines about the global COVID-19 crisis. However, as we begin our process of healing from these circumstances, it's time we unite under one goal: **holding the Chinese Communist Party accountable.**

We must rely on strong leaders, like Senator Cory Gardner (R-CO), who has been an outspoken advocate for holding the Chinese government accountable. **Cory has called on both the WHO and the National Security Council to take swift action against the Chinese Communist Party's use of this crisis to advance their interests.**

**_Why should we allow the Chinese Communist Party to continue stealing intellectual property, while the rest of the world suffers?_**

**_If you agree that these calculated and negligent actions should cease to continue, don't hesitate to join us by adding your name here:_**
**[**STAND UP TO COMMUNISM - ADD YOUR NAME**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QIFDlrJ3LmvkG8ZI-R2-DkaOlnmebjQNVETWsvM69a6MaxjEjorr6Xbbygd4Z7B-qlqMGZ44Yu7zjRocDjLGW4Adab_f9jXF2NBI893WctEJxFrj6_qq4s7QgJY0McnsOvTixem5BFDR7Q2is1Lv7cdwL2UzWWMZOFMwcrQTlqt17ighBEQc3YwY_a8nzBQUpVm3M7ZbRyq9IaxTa-0ttrK4Hj8kTYU-A1DgCI7VBOIsO9UdmoyHBisG2GMH3Bg67ZfY9XLuJG4b4E7rr0HgE6Wmd3raQ1tkOjWqGkWSpP3v06SbSxoPiIU042sLenMkpwHhNh6ev0avIUc_AypFFRgcjB9qYIwT6kiMhwlFdiM9XElFWXlf9uo1SF2BeOGQ&c=LatxzYUOONE0BRRcP3UhjmVcMstFTZRtYhe5NbGZnG49EfWihjqbCQ==&ch=DxQ2tH7d-CFFggdLX9DD3vGT4JNOwwuyBKbyggYumTpdtdQEkMEgPQ==)**

This inaction has directly impacted the spread of the pandemic, which is why it's time to put an end to the Communist Party's malicious actions and hold them accountable **_immediately_****.** **Sign below if you agree:**

We’re emailing you for just $4. Can we briefly explain why? To flip the Senate, Democrats will need to win four Republican-held seats. Even then, victory can only be guaranteed if we protect our incumbents — like Tina Smith. Minnesota is a must-win state to take back the majority, which is why it's a top target for Donald Trump, special interests, and GOP mega-donors. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Why?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello — I have an important question to ask you as we near the end of April and approach another critical deadline next week. I hope you’ll grant me a moment to explain why this is so important. I didn’t take the usual path to public office. I worked as a geologist then became a brewer and small business owner whose successful brewpub helped revitalize a neglected warehouse district in Denver. **Then, I ran for mayor and eventually governor, creating jobs and expanding health care and vote-by-mail right here in Colorado — getting things done that mattered for people by bringing folks together around our common values.** That same mentality is why I’m now running for U.S. Senate. It wasn’t easy then, and I know it won’t be easy now — not with the bickering and partisanship in Washington, which has been particularly unhelpful lately as our country grapples with the coronavirus outbreak. But I know we can do it again if we win this election the right way. **My opponent is considered the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country, but he’s also backed by Mitch McConnell’s network of right-wing billionaire donors who have booked millions of dollars in Colorado in recent weeks, presumably targeting our campaign.** So, as we approach our April fundraising deadline, we’re looking to raise $500,000 from as many grassroots donors as possible in the next few days. **If you’re able, will you make a donation of $10 or more toward our April fundraising deadline today? Your support has never been more important, especially since we’ve canceled our in-person fundraising events due to the coronavirus outbreak. clean_body: | Hello — I have an important question to ask you as we near the end of April and approach another critical deadline next week. I hope you’ll grant me a moment to explain why this is so important. I didn’t take the usual path to public office. I worked as a geologist then became a brewer and small business owner whose successful brewpub helped revitalize a neglected warehouse district in Denver. Then, I ran for mayor and eventually governor, creating jobs and expanding health care and vote-by-mail right here in Colorado — getting things done that mattered for people by bringing folks together around our common values. That same mentality is why I’m now running for U.S. Senate. It wasn’t easy then, and I know it won’t be easy now — not with the bickering and partisanship in Washington, which has been particularly unhelpful lately as our country grapples with the coronavirus outbreak. But I know we can do it again if we win this election the right way. My opponent is considered the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country, but he’s also backed by Mitch McConnell’s network of right-wing billionaire donors who have booked millions of dollars in Colorado in recent weeks, presumably targeting our campaign. So, as we approach our April fundraising deadline, we’re looking to raise $500,000 from as many grassroots donors as possible in the next few days. If you’re able, will you make a donation of $10 or more toward our April fundraising deadline today? Your support has never been more important, especially since we’ve canceled our in-person fundraising events due to the coronavirus outbreak. Anything you can chip in will go a long way: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m ready to get to work in Washington — to lower our health care costs, safeguard families from gun violence, combat climate change, and make sure our country is ready to deal with pandemics like this one. But first, we need to win this race. I’m up for that challenge, and I need to know you’re with me. Thanks for stepping up and for all you do. — John P.S. We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. To pause our emails until this public health emergency has passed, Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 18886 Denver, CO 80218 United States

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Why I drove down to D.C. again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363901b8/55b66746/2065d1cb/80e6005/1702293713/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey, On Thursday, once again I drove from Boston to D.C. to cast my vote for another COVID-19 relief package. And once again the package did not provide nearly enough for a nation that is suffering more than it should, because of President Trump and GOP leadership in the Senate. This bill will deliver some critical support to small businesses, hospitals, and help ramp up more testing -- but the idea that further relief for our workers, families, states and communities is being hamstrung by Republican politics right now is beyond the pale. Ultimately, this latest bill will help people. But it won't help nearly enough people. Incremental progress isn't enough when thousands are dying daily and millions are out of work. The next COVID-19 package must be larger. Bolder. Braver. It must provide real relief. It must meet this moment of crisis. And I will continue to fight to ensure that happens. Be well. Be safe. Talk soon. Together, we will get through this. We will fight for our health, our safety, and our future. We will enact the bold policies we need to rebuild and recover. If you are financially able, please consider making a contribution to our campaign. Together, we can win our primary on September 1st, and give Massachusetts stronger leadership in the U.S. Senate. name: Team Warner
subject: Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4c1/53d9897e/54c34921/1c88686c/2819525945/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

Team Warner hopes that you and your families are staying safe and healthy. We will get through this together. Our team is committed to bringing you updates on what Mark Warner is working on to make sure that all Virginians are cared for during this difficult time.

This week, the Senate unanimously passed their latest **[bi-partisan coronavirus relief package](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4c1/53d9897e/54c34921/1c88686b/2819525945/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cnn.com/2020/04/21/politics/chuck-schumer-coronavirus-relief-small-business-cnntv/index.html")** , aimed at helping struggling businesses, which included:
* $310 billion to fund the Paycheck Protection Program, of which $60 billion was earmarked for women-owned businesses, minority-owned businesses, and businesses in rural areas.
* $75 billion to support health care providers who are on the front lines of the coronavirus pandemic.
* $60 billion to fulfill Economic Injury Disaster Loans (EIDLs) to help small and mid-sized businesses who have seen their revenue impacted by the pandemic.
* $25 billion to increase coronavirus testing and research, which will be critical to eventually re-opening the economy.

That bill is a great step toward making sure workers and small businesses are protected through this pandemic, but there's still work to be done.

That's why Mark is working with Senators Sanders, Jones, and Blumenthal on the **[Paycheck Security Act](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4c1/53d9897e/54c34921/1c88686a/2819525945/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.vox.com/2020/4/17/21225177/senate-paycheck-security-act")** , would cover the payroll expenses for workers making up to $90,000 per year at any company whose business has been severely impacted by this pandemic. This would not only secure the paychecks and health care benefits of millions of American workers, it would help stabilize the economy and prevent future layoffs.

The Paycheck Security Act isn't Mark's only priority this week. Here's what else Mark is working on:
* Mark joined his Senate colleagues in calling on pharmaceutical companies to **[diversify clinical trials for coronavirus treatments](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4c1/53d9897e/54c34921/1c886869/2819525945/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://news.bloomberglaw.com/coronavirus/senators-say-minorities-women-must-be-part-of-covid-19-tests")** , to include subjects to reflect the American people -- including more women, members of minority communities, and LGBTQIA individuals.
* Mark continued his efforts to ensure that folks in rural areas -- including more than 770 thousand Virginians -- gain **[access to affordable and reliable broadband internet service](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4c1/53d9897e/54c34921/1c886868/2819525945/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/washington-dc/sen-warner-asks-fcc-to-take-immediate-action-to-help-provide-broadband-to-all-virginians/")**.
* Mark joined his Democratic Senate colleagues in calling on the Trump administration to work with them to combat the **[rise in hate crimes and race-based harassment toward Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4c1/53d9897e/54c34921/1c886857/2819525945/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.businessinsider.com/democrats-pledge-to-work-with-trump-combat-anti-asian-hate-2020-4")** in response to the coronavirus pandemic.
* On Thursday, Mark held another virtual town hall event to talk about the coronavirus response and answer questions from folks across the Commonwealth. If you missed it, you can **[watch a recording of the event on Mark's Facebook page](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4c1/53d9897e/54c34921/1c886856/2819525945/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=231228631466626&ref=watch_permalink")** (you do not need a Facebook account to access this!)

Be well,
Team Warner
|
---

Let’s start with the good news: Everybody agrees that Democrats have a real chance at taking Mitch McConnell’s Senate majority this year. = = = Even better news: All this good news is getting to Mitch. He’s running like he’s scared — he’s been attacking our campaign on Twitter and investing huge amounts in attack ads. But here’s the bad news that we can’t ignore: Our fundraising numbers have been slipping over the weekend. = **= For the past weeks, we’ve seen how dangerous and reckless Mitch can be, how little he even tries to pretend to care. If you’re sick and tired of Mitch’s politics like we are, please remember that this election is our chance to change all of this. body:
****

TODAY is Melania's birthday and we are about to send her a birthday card from our most loyal Team Lewis members! THIS IS YOUR LAST OPPORTUNITY TO WISH FLOTUS A HAPPY BIRTHDAY!
If you would prefer not to receive future mailings, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDIzNjAzMTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1NjAwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

TODAY is Melania's birthday and we are about to send her a birthday card from our most loyal Team Lewis members!

****
**THIS IS YOUR LAST OPPORTUNITY TO WISH FLOTUS A HAPPY BIRTHDAY!**

Make sure to [sign your name](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDIzNjAzMTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1NjAwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0) to Melania's birthday card so we can let the First Lady know how grateful we are for her stewardship in the White House on her special day. Join us in sending best wishes to Melania on her special day by [adding your name to Team Lewis' birthday card to FLOTUS. ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDIzNjAzMTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1NjAwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Jason Lewis

| | Hey folks - today is Francis' birthday! Later this afternoon, we are gathering our staff for a Zoom chat to raise a toast to our fearless leader on his special day. That's when we'll present him with his digital birthday card from top supporters like you. We still want to get another 25 folks to sign the card to really show Francis that we're thinking of him today. **[Click here to sign our digital birthday card, we know Francis would really appreciate it!](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4cf/388db0e9/8d663f6/609ba684/2782791021/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://conole.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/CON_EM_EN_200426_bday_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+sign+our+digital+birthday+&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200426_Bday2_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200426_Bday2_U1_X1")** | [](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4cf/388db0e9/8d663f6/609ba683/2782791021/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/CON_EM_EN_200426_bday_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200426_Bday2_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200426_Bday2_U1_X1")
---
Francis has dedicated his entire life to serving his country and community. He thinks about how he can help improve the lives of his neighbors every single day -- so let's show him that we're thinking of him, too.
**[Add your name -- and a personal message -- to our digital birthday card right away!](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4cf/388db0e9/8d663f6/609ba682/2782791021/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://conole.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/CON_EM_EN_200426_bday_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name++and+a+personal+message++t&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200426_Bday2_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200426_Bday2_U1_X1")**
Thanks much,
Will

| [ ](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4cf/388db0e9/8d663f6/609ba681/2782791021/VEsD/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conoleforcongress.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200426_Bday2_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200426_Bday2_U1_X1")

name: WTF via Voter Protection Project
subject: McConnell's latest TERRIBLE comment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| |
# **Peter, the "Grim Reaper" is at it again.**
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d6/72412298/4fa2f2bb/6104fca0/977285237/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9hcHJpbCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNDI2X0JsdWVCYWlsb3V0X1UxX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_april?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2") Mitch McConnell is currently under FIRE. He's put a pause on ALL state and local coronavirus related assistance in the Senate,_instead suggesting states declare bankruptcy._ **Mitch has no problem giving corporations billions of dollars, but he is ready to leave states like his very own Kentucky behind!** He's currently in a **TIED** Senate race. So, we're seizing this opportunity to expose his true loyalties and put his opponent Amy McGrath on top. [**Can we count on you to step up and donate today?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d6/72412298/4fa2f2bb/6104fca3/977285237/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9hcHJpbCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNDI2X0JsdWVCYWlsb3V0X1UxX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_april?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+step+up+and+donat&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d6/72412298/4fa2f2bb/6104fca2/977285237/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9hcHJpbCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNDI2X0JsdWVCYWlsb3V0X1UxX1gyIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_april?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2")

Mitch even went as far to call state-based coronavirus relief**_" Blue State Bailouts."_**
Peter, we're furious. But luckily so is everyone else...
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04d6/72412298/4fa2f2bb/6104fca8/977285237/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9hcHJpbCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNDI2X0JsdWVCYWlsb3V0X1UxX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_april?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200426_BlueBailout_U1_X2")

name: Team Collins
subject: Every dollar counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
There is no sugarcoating this. We are being tremendously outspent. Chuck Schumer and liberal mega-donors are flooding Maine with cash to defeat Susan. While Susan is working around the clock to help Mainers get through and recover from the Covid-19 crisis -- these dark money groups continue to spread lies about her record and the critical work she is doing for the state.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDIzNjA1MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1ODczOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIzNjA1MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1ODczOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDIzNjA1MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1ODczOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
_**There is no sugarcoating this.**_
We are being tremendously outspent. Chuck Schumer and liberal mega-donors are flooding Maine with cash to defeat Susan.
**While Susan is working around the clock to help Mainers get through and recover from the Covid-19 crisis -- these dark money groups continue to spread lies about her record and the critical work she is doing for the state.**
Susan has been the champion of ensuring small businesses have access to money to keep the lights on and pay employees. _In these uncertain times, we need Susan 's leadership now more than ever._
The airwaves have been blanketed with negative ads that are smearing Susan's record.It is shocking and disappointing that Chuck Schumer and his out-of-state donors are using this crisis to try to score political points.
[**As one of Susan 's most loyal supporters we are hoping you will dig deep and make a generous donation of $5, $10, $25 or even $50. Every dollar you give makes an enormous impact on this race.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDIzNjA1MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1ODczOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Susan has worked across the aisle to secure small business funding and ensure that folks all across the state have access to the supplies they need to be safe. Sadly, Sara Gideon and her allies in the media are trying to distort Susan's record. But Mainers know the truth.
[**We are counting on you to make a donation of $5, $10, $25 or $50 to help us fight back.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIzNjA1MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1ODczOAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Every donation, no matter how small will help ensure we have the resources to promote Susan's work for Maine.
Susan has spent her career fighting for Maine, and she continues to work hard in these challenging times. **We need to stand with her now!**
-Team Collins
[DONATE](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIzNjA1MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1ODczOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Mike Turner
subject: We can’t let Nancy Pelosi get away with her plan.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Nancy Pelosi and her campaign arm, the DCCC, have recently added my congressional seat to its list of targets that they hope to flip in November.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
**Nancy Pelosi and her campaign arm, the DCCC, have recently added my congressional seat to its list of targets that they hope to flip in November**.
With this important seat officially on their radar, special interest donors from across the nation have started to empty their pocketbooks and drop massive amounts of money into this congressional district in the hopes of stealing this seat so that they can expand their House majority even further. [_**We can 't let Nancy get away with her plan to win here! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter, now that this race is fully digital, Nancy Pelosi is directing her top donors to pour thousands into my Washington lobbyist opponent's digital assets.
And with this campaign now approaching it's most important fundraising deadline to date, we must reach our fundraising goal before the end of the month.
With Nancy Pelosi and her allies continuing to flood the district with money to be used to campaign against me, I need your help. [_**Would you be able to rush in a donation of any amount right now to prevent Pelosi from winning a key seat in November 's election? **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[Donate $100 to support Mike Turner!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $75 to support Mike Turner!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $45 to support Mike Turner!>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate Any Amount to support Mike Turner!>>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
I know that this is a hard time Peter, but if you could [_**please chip in just $15, $10, $5, or even $1 to show your support today**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0), it would go a long way to show Pelosi that her special interest money can't buy this seat.
Thank you,
Mike Turner
**[**Donate Today!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIzNjA1MzUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0Mjc1OTEyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: an update on my work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/CzgfrRFKpvTCvvDWypTRGhNTWVT7e_KMKIGsQt9o5ns=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200424-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Dear Peter, I am checking in to give you all an update on what I've been working on with my congressional team for the past two weeks. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/AyftZofUBth_McanRHXTn3wyp64RYHAVbnHytL9wj9c=)
[_**COVID-19 Relief Package Vote**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/mf-tbg5Sk57nRmM0C-0ScHH5f1LBoV4GfnR2oOqjzEA=)
On Thursday, I was back on Capitol Hill, where **I testified before the House Committee on Small Business** about the challenges facing Central Virginia's small businesses and their employees. I spoke about how vital the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) has been to businesses in our district and why it urgently needed additional funding. Later in the day, **I voted to pass the Paycheck Protection Program and Healthcare Enhancement Act,** which will provide essential funding to the PPP, which, despite its challenges, has been a lifeline to so many of the small business owners I serve. This bipartisan package, which passed 388-5, also includes billions of dollars in lifesaving funding for hospitals, healthcare workers, nursing homes, and expands COVID-19 testing in Virginia and across the country. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/Ylq-nmN1OwivvLrlz3q8TEnfqUa4XeOgh6pqSNVivdI=)
[_**Funding and Flexibility for Small Businesses**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/N8dzWvrwnaCngfANcyYWvX2PqQ4qL5oUDVVxE8usELs=)
In my conversations with small business owners across our district, they have praised PPP, but shared their concerns about the restrictions the Small Business Administration (SBA) put on the loans. In response, **I led a bipartisan effort to improve flexibility and cut red tape** for our small businesses that are seeking assistance through the PPP. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/16fUElkRqfbZRCYZybnB2zL0rYVcKQaaSJkbcLf1LC4=)
[_**Nursing Homes**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/yu0L35sBGBN6IMt7IAIrQT-l5KWpP4cJxfkkABDikAY=)
The majority of Virginians who have died from COVID-19 have been residents in nursing homes or long-term care facilities. In our district, the heartbreak and tragedy is immense as our nursing homes and long-term care facilities have faced the greatest loss of life in the state. **That 's why I've made protecting these vulnerable residents a priority. ** **I led a bipartisan effort** calling on the Department of Health and Human Services to allocate at least $25 billion of the $100 billion we appropriated for assistance to medical facilities in the CARES Act to nursing homes and long-term care facilities. I encouraged Governor Northam to create a **task force to fight the virus in Virginia 's nursing homes and long-term care facilities,** and I am fighting to get **personal protective equipment (PPE) for our nursing home staff, first responders, and all healthcare professionals so that they can protect themselves and the communities they serve.** During this time, it's **more important than ever that we stay connected.** Please make sure you're following my [_**Facebook**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/GP0eVFoyj-BeRd7G9I-R5bK_erM_Jr3-NlRWzWTY5H4=) and [_**Twitter**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/yzigt4hPCFNtYSTHgGoeZKhvBoRDxZm5_PzyUEmdCqY=) pages -- that's where you'll find the most up-to-date information.
---

Hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy, _Abigail_

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/CzgfrRFKpvTCvvDWypTRGhNTWVT7e_KMKIGsQt9o5ns=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200424-1-EM&amount=25) | | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/pStA9BLarME-VUc-MfqXEiubDWV-kCIV-1x_Snnxvqo=?refcode=4.26.20)
---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/T74jBcD1baGfA7Sajaw0bVxLjLRf7yhhR-dLUG1qgwg=).

If you wish to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/vp5Ogp5t0AipK-MvL5EKiMEC7mv7Avd28wfZPcF8Hts=). [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/_fLQ8SGz6yFseDCAUm33TaWJwR6X2UhXgXL6GKxyePM=/W96oYYEsUThUeD3IMBdugGKLo90ywRSb-CKXTMqwydk=)

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: It’s time to show our strength
body:
Peter,
The other night I participated in a LIVE _My Faith Votes_ town-hall and was asked which Bible verse best prepares me for these difficult times and the coming election in November.
Since I was fifteen, the verse that’s had the most meaning to me personally is Philippians 4:13.
That verse -- “I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me” -- is getting me through this pandemic, and as Christians, it will help us prepare for a monumental election in November.
I say that because looking around at the news and social media, I see strength bubbling over. I see Christians striving hard to worship while respecting unfamiliar public health rules. I see Christians helping to care for both their neighbors and complete strangers. It’s inspiring.
I truly believe this experience can be a reawakening, and if harnessed correctly, we as Christians can recenter America around the Biblical values upon which she was founded.
If you’ve ever seen _The Untouchables_ , Sean Connery had a famous line where, while dying on the ground after being shot by a mob henchman, he says to Kevin Costner’s Eliot Ness, “what are you prepared to do?”
For me, I’m leading the charge with _My Faith Votes_ to get millions of Christians to the polls. We have a focused strategy and we are making measurable progress every single day.
[So, in my worst Sean Connery accent, I ask you -- what are you prepared to do? Are you prepared to help us in this fight by making a secure, tax-deductible donation right now](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200426apl02?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200426apl01ndb&n=1)?
There’s a lot to complain about in America today, but we should also remember what we’ve achieved. For one, we’ve confirmed a whole new generation of conservative jurists who believe deeply in protecting life and religious liberty. That seemed impossible, until we got it done.
If _My Faith Votes_ did not help to get millions of Christians to the polls in 2016, this may not have happened. Well, 2020 is even more important, and I’m asking you to think about what you personally have the ability to do.
On our end, we are activating 1 million new Christian voters in 11 swing states, equipping our youth on 300 Christian college and university campuses, and deploying an online voter guide for all 100,000 elections happening across the country in November because not everything that matters happens in Washington, D.C.
[If you are willing to directly support this important work, I ask you to do so now with an urgent, secure donation of any amount](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200426apl02?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200426apl01ndb&n=2).
Reestablishing an America based upon Biblical values has been at the forefront of my life’s work. I keep fighting because I know that just like you, I have a special role to play. It’s never been easy, but through Christ I find strength. And so even with setbacks, I push forward.
Together, we will continue to prove the doubters wrong and ensure that America continues to be that shining city on a hill.
Thank you for your commitment and support. It means a lot.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200426apl02?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200426apl01ndb&n=3)
Sincerely,
Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200426apl01ndb&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200426apl01ndb&n=5).

name: John Philip Sousa IV
subject: Turn It Around...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, there's still time to turn it around... * | | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, We need your help to turn this ship around! You see, new polls show President Donald Trump and Black Conservative SUPERSTAR John James are currently **LOSING** \- _though very narrowly_ \- in the vitally important swing state of **Michigan**. Look at John James' numbers against incumbent Democrat Senator Gary Peters: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqBL&mc=Jg&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EEcN9kC&) And look at this Quinnipiac poll showing a very close presidential race in Michigan: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqBL&mc=Jg&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EV1iGIq&) Of course, there's still 6 months until Election Day... ...but we MUST work hard to **Make Michigan RED** for President Trump! ...and we MUST work hard to elect Black Conservative Superstar John James to the U.S. Senate in Michigan! So what's our plan to **Make Michigan RED** this election? **Run radio ads targeting African-American voters.** In fact, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC is currently running highly-effective radio ads on Black radio stations in Michigan and critical swing states and Congressional races across the country! Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television, billboards, books, and issue guides targeting African-America voters and exposing the race-baiting lies liberals have been spoon-feeding them... **...and the results have been incredible.** Study after study has shown that our ads over the past few years have significantly improved Republican votes from African-Americans. If we can take back just 17% of the black vote from Democrats, then it's impossible for them to win... ...and if we can convince 25% of Black voters to vote **RED** in 2020, we could create a massive RED TSUNAMI – up and down the ballot! | [Chip-In $20.20 to Make Michigan RED ›››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqBL&mc=Jg&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFhgSDJ&)
---
**That's not as difficult as it sounds considering 33% of black voters already call themselves conservatives and support conservative policies --- but they still vote for Democrats.**
**Making Michigan RED** this election means touting President Trump's accomplishments for the Black community:
* Record low unemployment rate for African-Americans
* Federal funding for Historically Black Colleges and Universities
* Scholarships for African-American families seeking better quality schools
* Ending the killing of unborn Black babies by appointing conservative judges

[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqBL&mc=Jg&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFkMMEB&)**Making Michigan RED** this election means electing John James as Michigan's first African American (from either party) to the United States Senate...
**Making Michigan RED** this election means persuading enough African-American voters to stop voting for the failed socialist policies that have turned Detroit and Flint into poverty-stricken war zones...

name: Dapper the Dog

body:
There are a few things I've picked up on during my first month with the Macklers
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa162/18d6a294/4cbfddc6/26d61719/3601763356/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Woof -- I'm Dapper, James' dog and I'm asking for a _**[helping hand (or paw](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa162/18d6a294/4cbfddc6/26d61706/3601763356/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200426?refcode=jme200426_m&recurring=true"))**_! The Mackler family adopted me earlier this month and I couldn't be happier -- especially since they've been spending so much time at home, which means a lot of time for belly rubs and fetch. | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa162/18d6a294/4cbfddc6/26d61706/3601763356/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200426?refcode=jme200426_m&recurring=true")
---
There are a few things I've picked up on over the course of our first month together:
1. **Election Day** : It's what James and his whole team have been working toward.
2. **Grassroots support** : It's what makes dad's campaign possible.
3. **The end-of-month deadline** : James says there's an important goal he has to reach before then.

I'm usually a water-bowl-half-full type of dog but people are starting to get nervous about hitting the end of month goal.
[_**So if you 're able to chip in a few bones -- sorry, I mean bucks -- I know it would mean so much to James. (Plus, the less time James has to spend trying to reach this goal means the more time he can spend playing with me!)**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa162/18d6a294/4cbfddc6/26d61706/3601763356/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200426?refcode=jme200426_m&recurring=true")

Amy Klobuchar is _fighting like hell_ to pass a national vote-by-mail program! [**But, Mitch McConnell and Trump are going to pull out every dirty trick in the book to send Amy's bill _straight to the garbage_.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17274169/188916419/152753348?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmN2YyYTE4LTE5ODgtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Uv1TCX0efWMrgDfBaHQJnA3dnpqhi-QxeB_loOZx13Y=&emci=f1f00c68-e387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8f7f2a18-1988-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)

_Why?_ Because when more people vote in a nationwide election, the Democrat usually wins. Republicans are terrified of losing power, so they're trying to RIG our elections by BLOCKING vote-by-mail!!

[**The COVID-19 pandemic has made this more urgent than ever. We need 5,000 good Democrats to answer Amy Klobuchar's call to action and sign this petition to DEMAND vote-by-mail for every single voter. Hurry -- please sign right away! >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17274170/188916420/152753348?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmN2YyYTE4LTE5ODgtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Uv1TCX0efWMrgDfBaHQJnA3dnpqhi-QxeB_loOZx13Y=&emci=f1f00c68-e387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8f7f2a18-1988-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036) | [ADD MY NAME »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17274171/188916421/152753348?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmN2YyYTE4LTE5ODgtZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Uv1TCX0efWMrgDfBaHQJnA3dnpqhi-QxeB_loOZx13Y=&emci=f1f00c68-e387-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=8f7f2a18-1988-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: 100 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3b0f61cdd0ae/the-difference-is-black-and-white-6884398?e=1050d051da)
---
| | Friends,

Do you remember what you were doing 100 days ago? No matter what you were doing, most of us can look back at that time now and realize how quickly 100 days has flown by and how much has changed in that short amount of time.

100 days from now Kansans will be going to the ballot box to vote in the August primary. We've come so far over the course of this campaign, but now the finish line is in sight.
---
| I've fought for [our conservative Kansas values](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=991f69cbc0&e=1050d051da) my entire life. I established the Pittsburg State College Republicans and reorganized the Cherokee County Republican Party. I represented Southeast Kansas in the State Senate and I'm currently fighting for our conservative values as Kansas Treasurer.
---
| _**I have an A+ rating from the NRA**_ because I successfully passed Constitutional Carry in Kansas and I have a 100% pro-gun voting record.
---
| _**I won the Pro-Life Hero Award**_ from Kansans for Life because [I successfully passed Simon's Law in Kansas](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4c82976de2&e=1050d051da) and I have a 100% pro-life voting record.
---
| _**I have been a lifelong conservative**_ and have led on the issues that matter to Kansans, including property tax reform and voting to lower tax rates for Kansans.
---
| We've done a great job in Kansas, but _**President Trump needs conservative fighters to stand with him in Washington D.C.**_

Over these next 100 days, you can count on a couple of things. One of them is that we will work harder than any other campaign out there. The other being that _**you can count on me to fight for our shared conservative Kansas values.**_

We're in this together. [Join us in the fight to send strong reinforcements to stand with President Trump. ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=69a77d4c56&e=1050d051da)

Yours in the fight,
Jake LaTurner
---
| [Chip in to support our campaign](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e66d97fd55&e=1050d051da "Chip in to support our campaign")

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Our kids' education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Having my kids at home makes me appreciate our public school teachers that much more.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489031f/7f51f7bc/4f3a07d8/4ef1706b/1566417488/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, for anyone who's got young kids at home like I do, the past few weeks have been a reminder of just how important public education is and how much work it takes to help our kids learn.

It's an unforgettable example of why we need a senator who will put our public schools first and who values the contributions of teachers and school staff. **[Will you donate today to help me fight for our kids in the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489031f/7f51f7bc/4f3a07d8/4ef1706a/1566417488/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200426.2nd__1311__&amount=10")

Sen. Cornyn hasn't been that leader, Peter. He's voted to strip funds from the schools that millions of families rely on to give their children a quality education and the best chance at the American dream.**

It's time for change, but I can't do it alone: I need your help to beat him this November and make sure we're putting public schools first! **[Will you pitch in to help me win this race?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489031f/7f51f7bc/4f3a07d8/4ef1706a/1566417488/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200426.2nd__1311__&amount=10")**

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489031f/7f51f7bc/4f3a07d8/4ef1706a/1566417488/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200426.2nd__1311__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489031f/7f51f7bc/4f3a07d8/4ef17069/1566417488/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1311&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489031f/7f51f7bc/4f3a07d8/4ef17068/1566417488/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: EPA ALERT
subject: ADD YOUR NAME to stop Trump's pollution brigade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action, 314action
body:
| Since Donald Trump won in 2016, the attacks on science and public health have been constant.**

His administration has weakened environmental laws, from fuel standards to pollution protections, and even limited federal scientists' ability to study how pollution impacts our health.

_...and this is all happening during a global pandemic._

[Enough is enough. We must demand that the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) stop putting corporate profits over people and the environment!](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4d25/4bd7760e/5b55bf11/77af7786/4288188036/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectpeopleenvironment/?code=314&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.314action.org%2Fsagase&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Enough+is+enough+We+must+demand+that+the&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&source=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&refcode=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa")

| [SIGN ON](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4d25/4bd7760e/5b55bf11/77af7785/4288188036/VEsE/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectpeopleenvironment/?code=314&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.314action.org%2Fsagase&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&source=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&refcode=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa")
---

[With Trump, it's a constant assault on truth and reason. But we're determined to stop his anti-science crusade. The EPA was established to protect public health, not private profits.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4d25/4bd7760e/5b55bf11/77af7784/4288188036/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectpeopleenvironment/?code=314&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.314action.org%2Fsagase&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+With+Trump+itrsquos+a+constant+assault+o&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&source=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&refcode=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa")

[Add your name today to tell the EPA: PROTECT PEOPLE, NOT PROFIT!](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4d25/4bd7760e/5b55bf11/77af7783/4288188036/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectpeopleenvironment/?code=314&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.314action.org%2Fsagase&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+today+to+tell+the+EPA+PROT&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&source=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&refcode=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa")

Thanks for speaking out with us.

314 Action Fund

Paid for by 314 Action, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4d25/4bd7760e/5b55bf11/77af7782/4288188036/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&source=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&refcode=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4d25/4bd7760e/5b55bf11/77af7781/4288188036/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa&source=314_EM_PT_1MO_1MC_200426_1_1_epa")** to make a donation.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Will you split a contribution between six fantastic Democratic women running to defeat Republicans?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Rooting out corruption and making Washington work for working people starts with protecting our House majority this November. Republicans have proved over and over again that they'll continue to put | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e9104e/1882432341/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Rooting out corruption and making Washington work for working people starts with protecting our House majority this November.

Republicans have proved over and over again that they'll continue to put corporations and special interests above all else.

That's why it's so important we defeat them in November and flip even more Republican-held seats. We're not just playing defense -- we're going on offense.

**So today I 'm asking if you can take part in the fight and split a contribution between six fantastic Democratic women running to defeat Republicans: Celeste Williams, Tricia Zunker, Kara Eastman, Candace Valenzuela, Gina Ortiz Jones, and Christy Smith.

[If you're able to support them financially right now, please click here to split a contribution between their campaigns and Warren Democrats today.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910b1/1882432341/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWN3LXR6LWtlLWN2LWdvLWNzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyMkZfRUdSX1RBTl9FXzIwMjAwNDI2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-cw-tz-ke-cv-go-cs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ22F_EGR_TAN_E_20200426_V1S2_P")**

**Celeste Williams (AR-3)** knows that no one should go broke because they get sick, that all people deserve access to a world class education, and that workers in America should be treated with dignity.

As an Associate Justice of the Ho-Chunk Supreme Court, President of the Wausau School Board, a professor, and a lawyer, **Tricia Zunker (WI-7 special)** has the vision and courage Wisconsinites deserve during this time of crisis.

We need **Kara Eastman (NE-2)** in Congress to join the fight on health care, tackling student debt, and taking on corporate power. She'll represent Nebraskans with the passion and effectiveness that she's already shown as a social worker, a nonprofit leader, and as a champion for change.

As an educator and former school board leader, **Candace Valenzuela (TX-24)** knows first hand the struggles that working families face. I know she'll be an unwavering force in Congress who will fight tirelessly for them both at home and in Washington.

**Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23)** will be a champion for working families in Congress. She'll stand up to corporate special interests and fight for quality, affordable health care, a fair and compassionate immigration system, and an economy that works for everyone.

By swearing to never take a dime from a corporate PAC or D.C. lobbyist, **Christy Smith (CA-25)** will fight for her constituents, to lower the cost of prescription drugs, make health care more affordable, provide American workers paid sick leave, and ensure the needs of families come first.

All six of these women need our support to win Republican-held seats and help make sure we protect our majority. That's the only way we'll make sure Washington starts working for working people.

[**If you 're able, please split a donation between Celeste, Tricia, Kara, Candace, Gina, Christy, and our campaign today. These women are fighters and need our support.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910b1/1882432341/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWN3LXR6LWtlLWN2LWdvLWNzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyMkZfRUdSX1RBTl9FXzIwMjAwNDI2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-cw-tz-ke-cv-go-cs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ22F_EGR_TAN_E_20200426_V1S2_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910b1/1882432341/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWN3LXR6LWtlLWN2LWdvLWNzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyMkZfRUdSX1RBTl9FXzIwMjAwNDI2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-cw-tz-ke-cv-go-cs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ22F_EGR_TAN_E_20200426_V1S2_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910a4/1882432341/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910a7/1882432341/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910a6/1882432341/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910a9/1882432341/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910a8/1882432341/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257d5/45c30650/1f550844d/66e910ab/1882432341/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Tina Smith
subject: Facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
I couldn't be more grateful to have you by my side as our grassroots campaign continues to grow. But we also can't ignore the facts: **If the rest of the map stays the same, Donald Trump can lose Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin, but if he wins Minnesota, he wins re-election. That’s basically the whole ballgame.** Look, Trump only lost Minnesota by one and a half points. That makes our state one of his top targets this year, and he won’t let us slip through his fingers again. Super PACs supporting him dumped millions into Minnesota in 2018, and the Trump campaign has already pledged to spend millions more this time around. This is a must-win seat if Democrats are going to take back the Senate majority, and it’s a must-win state if we’re going to get Trump out of the White House. But we've got an expensive fight on our hands. So, I’m asking: **If it makes sense for you financially, can you chip in just $10 to help us hold strong in Minnesota? Our end-of-month deadline is coming up in just a few days, which means we don’t have a lot of time left to hit our grassroots goal for April. clean_body: | I couldn't be more grateful to have you by my side as our grassroots campaign continues to grow. But we also can't ignore the facts: If the rest of the map stays the same, Donald Trump can lose Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin, but if he wins Minnesota, he wins re-election. That’s basically the whole ballgame. Look, Trump only lost Minnesota by one and a half points. That makes our state one of his top targets this year, and he won’t let us slip through his fingers again. Super PACs supporting him dumped millions into Minnesota in 2018, and the Trump campaign has already pledged to spend millions more this time around. This is a must-win seat if Democrats are going to take back the Senate majority, and it’s a must-win state if we’re going to get Trump out of the White House. But we've got an expensive fight on our hands. So, I’m asking: If it makes sense for you financially, can you chip in just $10 to help us hold strong in Minnesota? Our end-of-month deadline is coming up in just a few days, which means we don’t have a lot of time left to hit our grassroots goal for April. You can donate right here: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I can’t thank you enough for everything you do for our campaign. With your help, we’ll make sure Trump doesn’t flip Minnesota red. All my best, Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Maintaining your mental and emotional health
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
Hello friend,
In what may be one of the darkest hours in our state's history, the resiliency and spirit of Rhode Islanders is shining through. We've seen neighbors offering to pick up groceries for one another, organizations creating opportunities for connection and reflection, young people finding innovative ways to connect our most vulnerable with their loved ones. There are everyday heroes all around us. But these are difficult times we're living through, and that has no small effect on people's mental health. Today, I want to remind you that you're not alone and share some of the many resources that are available to you here in Rhode Island.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DqQ9csn9k8qrOHXDuxttkmR3ALxWPvGL0SQf8YSbebAtaPIBALUyUSvhNi6Atq4ZSbsGJpQsjQ6pu-CwDMXoOGo7YzqLety6mQieuysFEBd8Q9wMt2uo1wEzVJ1icA6tjK1DFHRvtUOGYgyuWb2FlJ1rKrBANM_UXq-St4MgWNb70ogfn5bOUODKRnr2j6Et6bHynjdenNc=&c=GSr9wjvD4EBRB7AGjqEApJdXt4R3iYpPvL9PMnFBxS8PwmDQZ82t2Q==&ch=efeDOyOausU2I_QdUCTOJuYOIpYDo2tqJoo-iLtvtZ7aEwBqM-drFA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DqQ9csn9k8qrOHXDuxttkmR3ALxWPvGL0SQf8YSbebAtaPIBALUyUSvhNi6Atq4ZSbsGJpQsjQ6pu-CwDMXoOGo7YzqLety6mQieuysFEBd8Q9wMt2uo1wEzVJ1icA6tjK1DFHRvtUOGYgyuWb2FlJ1rKrBANM_UXq-St4MgWNb70ogfn5bOUODKRnr2j6Et6bHynjdenNc=&c=GSr9wjvD4EBRB7AGjqEApJdXt4R3iYpPvL9PMnFBxS8PwmDQZ82t2Q==&ch=efeDOyOausU2I_QdUCTOJuYOIpYDo2tqJoo-iLtvtZ7aEwBqM-drFA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| It's amazing that so many Rhode Islanders are thinking of others, but it's important that we remember to be kind to ourselves. We know that many Rhode Islanders were dealing with mental health issues before this pandemic began, and those challenges are only exacerbated now. And issues caused by this pandemic like isolation and unemployment are linked to higher rates of depression and anxiety.
Even in these troubling, unprecedented times, help is available.

* Insurance companies are required to cover teletherapy just like they would in-person treatment. You can talk to a mental health provider while at home.
* If you need helping finding a professional or other resources, you can contact [BH Link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DqQ9csn9k8qrOHXDuxttkmR3ALxWPvGL0SQf8YSbebAtaPIBALUyUWd7htymd4UPIqyCl7vixHIL61-qTYxM02y39-YdOdQXv0NkyUJqkojvLD4VWF7zH3mWVWmksax_1v70PRn9KzDqbWWyhycDJw==&c=GSr9wjvD4EBRB7AGjqEApJdXt4R3iYpPvL9PMnFBxS8PwmDQZ82t2Q==&ch=efeDOyOausU2I_QdUCTOJuYOIpYDo2tqJoo-iLtvtZ7aEwBqM-drFA==), our state's 24/7 hotline and triage center for adults in crisis. They can be reached by phone at (401) 414-LINK
* If you are under 18, or know a child who needs help, we also have a 24/7 hotline for kids in crisis. You can call [Kids' Link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DqQ9csn9k8qrOHXDuxttkmR3ALxWPvGL0SQf8YSbebAtaPIBALUyUZMyuAMNfo08wgj_vN2C9ter7uX4R_YOiCyLybZ1L20YbFO401dPp1lvTk_jMGk2cpNTfw0rdKO9W_3fM0kmJ8cVIVfOKk4-7wsdfEtEU5GJHwP2BJTNCuM0471kW-ceIN5i__4MHd0o&c=GSr9wjvD4EBRB7AGjqEApJdXt4R3iYpPvL9PMnFBxS8PwmDQZ82t2Q==&ch=efeDOyOausU2I_QdUCTOJuYOIpYDo2tqJoo-iLtvtZ7aEwBqM-drFA==) at (855) 543-5465.

It's okay to feel scared, depressed, lonely or restless. I want to encourage all Rhode Islanders to pay attention to your mental health and make time for yourself if you can. Find time to read a good book or exercise or learn to bake--whatever it is that brings you joy and comfort during this stressful time. And remember to reach out for help if you need it.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DqQ9csn9k8qrOHXDuxttkmR3ALxWPvGL0SQf8YSbebAtaPIBALUyUZMyuAMNfo08Y2utgSNhdMS6ZeOAkoVRfpODrr5Li5WWF14j60XWSPq2IGhml90XbPjjEtHzf5_LcVdPLa4VOyGg6-PsxKa4FyGSqZuuLXZczoF3BKflqQtH8HUHyVLGBNorRsqXKactj4PPTjckJOtDJQ75ZQsEgm3mAJ2ZnpU2&c=GSr9wjvD4EBRB7AGjqEApJdXt4R3iYpPvL9PMnFBxS8PwmDQZ82t2Q==&ch=efeDOyOausU2I_QdUCTOJuYOIpYDo2tqJoo-iLtvtZ7aEwBqM-drFA==)
---
| I want to give a special shout out to the mental health providers in Rhode Island who have risen to the occasion in a remarkable fashion. Many are offering telemedicine and going out of their way to check in on patients. And essential behavioral health staff are fighting on our front lines courageously caring for patients and clients in the community, residential group homes, hospitals, and health centers. On behalf of all Rhode Islanders, thank you for your commitment and bravery.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DqQ9csn9k8qrOHXDuxttkmR3ALxWPvGL0SQf8YSbebAtaPIBALUyUZMyuAMNfo087py0hbdMaBgk-wOZFy5FvTE5vO9LAaDCQthnC8qQA4MvecemayWscwx9_wAtGaNwCF7HO1Xq9QGzHrg_MwHfVnrS5EPEwo4HtETZGqc82J9oUwKRnOUSWJouf2KlJ0k3i3oR9PbUex4cgChRnoPRgUtqSptwDScLun1W3vvNDl_1GXwgdnkHbLglZWN0228XW7vvW8zk2OZOAvrqfcQoSgSjkPGOz8b4TwoYjpNdDetkEpGyQFZ5Sjokjwc2xH4KVrhrSv-oD3Y=&c=GSr9wjvD4EBRB7AGjqEApJdXt4R3iYpPvL9PMnFBxS8PwmDQZ82t2Q==&ch=efeDOyOausU2I_QdUCTOJuYOIpYDo2tqJoo-iLtvtZ7aEwBqM-drFA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=1760add2-339e-4fa6-8320-a1dbf040dd31)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---
