name: Barbara Bollier
subject: Why I’m asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
I’m running for Senate because Kansans need leadership and a voice of reason in Washington -- not the partisan extremism they’d get from GOP candidates like Kris Kobach.

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17274552/188947626/302230496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0Nzg3Yi0yYjg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUO0aKQP-cVt-fF35K6VRu4vyuCP2-6wUrNKCW2zsNM=&emci=a9f54e02-2a88-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ed14787b-2b88-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10862544)

| | Team, I’m running for Senate because Kansans need leadership and a voice of reason in Washington -- not the partisan extremism they’d get from GOP candidates like Kris Kobach. But as a physician and a public servant, I know how crucial it is during this public health crisis that we hold back on hosting the in-person campaign events we normally would -- meaning fewer opportunities to reach the voters and no fundraising events for the foreseeable future. I am relying on this online, grassroots team more than ever before, and I am so thankful to everyone who has stepped up. But with the end of the month rapidly approaching, I need to know you have my back as we rush to finish April strong and meet our $20,000 fundraising goal. [**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important, team. Can I count on you to make a $5 contribution to help us meet our April goal and keep this campaign on track?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17274553/188947627/641939287?refcode=em200426i&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0Nzg3Yi0yYjg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUO0aKQP-cVt-fF35K6VRu4vyuCP2-6wUrNKCW2zsNM=) This is a make-or-break moment for our campaign. A new poll showed us leading Kobach by two points -- but we know the Republicans will stop at nothing to hold on to this seat in the fall. We can’t afford to lose any steam now. We need to double down on our efforts to flip this seat. Team, we’re nearly halfway to meeting our $20,000 goal. Will you join us? [**Donate $5 -- or whatever you can -- to help us meet our April fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17274554/188947628/641939287?refcode=em200426i&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0Nzg3Yi0yYjg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUO0aKQP-cVt-fF35K6VRu4vyuCP2-6wUrNKCW2zsNM=) Thank you, Barbara Bollier **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17274555/188947629/641939287?refcode=em200426i&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0Nzg3Yi0yYjg4LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUO0aKQP-cVt-fF35K6VRu4vyuCP2-6wUrNKCW2zsNM=)**

name: Team Cory
subject: The latest coronavirus relief package
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
And what it could mean for you and your loved ones. |
#
Team -- In the past few weeks, Cory has heard from small business owners about the help they need but aren't receiving. He's heard from frontline health care workers who don't have the protective equipment to do their jobs safely. And he's heard from hard-hit communities about the dire need for more testing. **Cory joined his Democratic colleagues in the Senate this week to pass additional COVID-19 response legislation that prioritized relief for small businesses, expanded access to testing, and provided more funding for hospitals hit hardest by the COVID-19 crisis.** Here's what's in the latest COVID-19 relief package:
* **Extending the Paycheck Protection Program.** The bill includes $310 billion in additional funding for the Small Business Administration to continue providing loans to small businesses that become forgivable if they keep their workers on payroll. This time, funding is also set aside for community financial institutions, credit unions, and other smaller lenders that were left out of the previous relief package.

* **Expanding access to COVID-19 testing.** $25 billion in funding is included for the development and distribution of additional COVID-19 testing kits as well as supporting lab research.

* **Helping hospitals and health care providers.** $75 billion is allocated for the most impacted hospitals and health care providers to compensate for lost revenue and expenses associated with treating coronavirus.

Without Cory and other Democratic leaders advocating for these important priorities, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans would have passed a $250 billion bill with no funding for the most vulnerable small businesses, additional testing, or our health care providers. We need reliable leaders like Cory in the Senate to fight for those who would otherwise be left behind. Thanks for being a critical member of the team that will keep Cory in the Senate and fighting for us all come this November. Team Booker P.S. Here's an important public service announcement from Cory: [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e36/5fca0d19/7d8cb0d7/291d68cb/2206117142/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDQyNi1jb3ZpZC1iaWxsLXVwZGF0ZSJ9/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200426-covid-bill-update?refcode=cab-em-200426-covid-bill-update") | [DONATE](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e36/5fca0d19/7d8cb0d7/291d68ca/2206117142/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDQyNi1jb3ZpZC1iaWxsLXVwZGF0ZSJ9/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200426-covid-bill-update?refcode=cab-em-200426-covid-bill-update")
---
